criteria_audit.gap: orientation_score is in ClassificationScoreInput and passed from calculateUserClassification but never referenced in resolveClassificationType; branch matrix mirrors pre-API computeClassification in classification.ts (7 TerminateWorkflow branches / 7 classification_os ids bTHyq–bTHyy). Could not independently parse drsam-99657.bubble action conditions to confirm orientation is unused in Bubble as well.

functional_audit.check: resolveClassification accepts four pillar score inputs and returns classification_os Bubble option ids matching bTHzg seven-branch classification matrix
calculateUserClassification(userId) loads user score fields, calls resolveClassification, and patches classification_option_classification_os via Supabase mirroring bTHzC ChangeThing bTIAc
onboarding profile pipeline invokes calculateUserClassification immediately after API-01 pillar calculators, matching bTGNJ workflow bTHlG ScheduleAPIEvent bTICO ordering

gaps: orientation_score is wired into the API contract but does not influence classification branches; orientation_score_number is never patched by a pillar calculator (sourced from results.orientation_score fallback after computeResults at save time).

capacity_erosion branch depends on pressure_profile === 'System Overload' read from results.pressure_profile (client computeResults preview) because API-03 pressure calculator runs after classification in the pipeline.

critiques.finding: AC-1 and bTHzg (parameter_count: 4) require orientation_score as an input, but resolveClassificationType never reads input.orientation_score — the parameter is dead code. Decompose review C-1 flagged this gap; implement prep deferred orientation sourcing to results fallback rather than patching orientation_score_number.
critiques.alternative: Either wire orientation_score into bTHzg branch conditions after parsing drsam-99657.bubble /api/bTHzi actions, or document explicitly that Bubble passes orientation but branch logic is stability/performance/alignment-only (matching classification.ts prototype) and downgrade AC-1 wording at decompose.

critiques.finding: calculateUserClassification reads orientation_score_number from onboarding_data JSONB but onboarding saves orientationScore (camelCase) and never patches orientation_score_number; classification relies on results.orientation_score fallback (default 3). Pillar scores use *_score_number keys patched by API-01.
critiques.alternative: Patch orientation_score_number in onboarding_data during saveOnboarding or add calculateUserOrientation in API-01; align readNumberField keys with onboarding_data.orientationScore nested shape.

critiques.finding: resolveClassification uses pressure_profile (optional 5th input, default 'Moderate Load') for the capacity_erosion branch, but API-03 calculateUserPressureProfile runs after classification in runOnboardingProfilePipeline; at classification time only client-side computeResults.pressure_profile is available.
critiques.alternative: Reorder pipeline to compute pressure profile before classification if Bubble reads user.pressure_profile_text at bTHzg time, or document that onboarding preview pressure_profile in results is the intended source for the classification branch.

critiques.finding: Branch logic is duplicated verbatim from frontend/src/lib/classification.ts computeClassification rather than extracted once; classifyUser.ts and classification.ts can drift.
critiques.alternative: Have resolveClassification delegate to computeClassification or share a single classifyFromScores module used by both onboarding preview and post-save pipeline.

critiques.finding: No unit tests cover resolveClassification branch matrix or classification_os id mapping for boundary scores (e.g. stability 3.0 vs 2.9 with System Overload).
critiques.alternative: Add table-driven tests for each of the seven classification_os outputs and fallback paths.
